languages.text: "Надеюсь, для исследований?" {n}Техножрец склоняет голову набок.{/n} "Последствия длительного ношения подобной... вещи перед вами, Вольный Торговец. Они, как мне кажется, удручающе показательны".

"For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."
languages.original_text: "Надеюсь, для исследований?" {n}Техножрец склоняет голову набок.{/n} "Последствия длительного ношения подобной... вещи перед вами, Вольный Торговец. Они, как мне кажется, удручающе показательны".

traits.locale_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

"For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

"For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

"For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

languages.text: «Espero que tenga fines investigativos». {n}El tecnosacerdote inclina la cabeza a un lado.{/n} «Los efectos de llevar una de esas... cosas un tiempo prolongado están a la vista, Comerciante Independiente. Creo que hablan por sí mismos, trágicamente».
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: «Espero que tenga fines investigativos». {n}El tecnosacerdote inclina la cabeza a un lado.{/n} «Los efectos de llevar una de esas... cosas un tiempo prolongado están a la vista, Comerciante Independiente. Creo que hablan por sí mismos, trágicamente».

languages.text: “但愿这只是出于研究目的？”{n}技术神甫歪了歪头。{/n}“行商浪人，长期携带您眼前这个……东西所造成的影响，在我看来，已经不言自明，而且相当令人沮丧。”
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: “但愿这只是出于研究目的？”{n}技术神甫歪了歪头。{/n}“行商浪人，长期携带您眼前这个……东西所造成的影响，在我看来，已经不言自明，而且相当令人沮丧。”

languages.text: "Für Forschungszwecke, hoffe ich?" {n}Der Techpriester senkt seien Kopf.{/n} "Die langfristigen Effekte eines solchen ... Dings, die Ihr möglicherweise vor Euch seht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich denke, sie sind deprimierend anschaulich."
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: "Für Forschungszwecke, hoffe ich?" {n}Der Techpriester senkt seien Kopf.{/n} "Die langfristigen Effekte eines solchen ... Dings, die Ihr möglicherweise vor Euch seht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich denke, sie sind deprimierend anschaulich."

languages.text: « À des fins de recherche, j'espère ? {n}demande le technoprêtre en inclinant la tête.{/n} Vous avez devant vous les effets à long terme du port d'un tel... engin, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Un spectacle tristement édifiant, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: « À des fins de recherche, j'espère ? {n}demande le technoprêtre en inclinant la tête.{/n} Vous avez devant vous les effets à long terme du port d'un tel... engin, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Un spectacle tristement édifiant, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Araştırma amaçlıdır umarım." {n}Tekno Rahip başını eğiyor.{/n} "Böyle bir... Şeyi taşımanın uzun vadeli etkileri karşınızda duruyor Hür Tacir. İnanıyorum ki bunlar moral bozucu derecede açıklayıcıdır."
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: "Araştırma amaçlıdır umarım." {n}Tekno Rahip başını eğiyor.{/n} "Böyle bir... Şeyi taşımanın uzun vadeli etkileri karşınızda duruyor Hür Tacir. İnanıyorum ki bunlar moral bozucu derecede açıklayıcıdır."

languages.text: 「研究のためですか？」{n}テクプリストは首を傾げた。{/n}「このような…目の前にあるようなものを持つことの長期的影響は、悲しくも示唆に富んでいると思いますよ、ローグトレーダー。」
languages.original_text: "For research purposes, I hope?" {n}The Tech-Priest tilts his head.{/n} "The long-term effects of bearing such a... thing that you may see before you, Rogue Trader. They are, I believe, depressingly illustrative."

traits.locale_text: 「研究のためですか？」{n}テクプリストは首を傾げた。{/n}「このような…目の前にあるようなものを持つことの長期的影響は、悲しくも示唆に富んでいると思いますよ、ローグトレーダー。」
